query:
-- Step 1: Create assignments for all matched DataGate billing items
-- Use billingItemExternalId (not billingItemId) as the column name
INSERT INTO service_billing_assignments (billingItemExternalId, serviceExternalId, customerExternalId, assignedBy, assignmentMethod, notes)
SELECT 
  bi.externalId as billingItemExternalId,
  bi.serviceExternalId,
  bi.customerExternalId,
  'system' as assignedBy,
  'auto' as assignmentMethod,
  CONCAT('DataGate auto-match: ', bi.description) as notes
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.billingPlatform = 'DataGate'
AND bi.matchStatus IN ('matched')
AND bi.serviceExternalId != ''
AND NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM service_billing_assignments sba 
  WHERE sba.billingItemExternalId = bi.externalId 
  AND sba.serviceExternalId = bi.serviceExternalId
);

-- Step 1: Create assignments for all matched DataGate billing items
-- Use billingItemExternalId (not billingItemId) as the column name
INSERT INTO service_billing_assignments (billingItemExternalId, serviceExternalId, customerExternalId, assignedBy, assignmentMethod, notes)
SELECT 
  bi.externalId as billingItemExternalId,
  bi.serviceExternalId,
  bi.customerExternalId,
  'system' as assignedBy,
  'auto' as assignmentMethod,
  CONCAT('DataGate auto-match: ', bi.description) as notes
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.billingPlatform = 'DataGate'
AND bi.matchStatus IN ('matched')
AND bi.serviceExternalId != ''
AND NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM service_billing_assignments sba 
  WHERE sba.billingItemExternalId = bi.externalId 
  AND sba.serviceExternalId = bi.serviceExternalId
